style_authority.note: Separates adaptive product context and shared semantic roles from platform-native navigation, controls, icons, materials, and motion.

reference_selection.note: Applies product context, iOS, Android, adaptive layout, accessibility, interaction, motion, design-system, and validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Repairs native trust, task flow, and adaptive structure without proposing identical mockups or decorative generic styling.

evidence_level.note: Labels the review L0 static/prose-only and explicitly denies source, build, simulator, emulator, device, accessibility-tree, and performance proof.

verified_boundary.note: Separates described violations from unknown source details, targets, hit slop, accessibility trees, windowing, gestures, persistence, and runtime results.

design_moves.note: Gives platform navigation, size-class layouts, target sizes, scalable type, native controls, semantic theming, accessible motion, recovery, and a parity matrix.

scope_control.note: Stays read-only, native-conformance focused, prioritized, and within the requested 150-line budget at 139 lines.
